channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BARMM Workers Receive P50 Daily Wage Increase
item.description: The Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE) has approved a significant wage increase for workers in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM), with a total of P50 per day allocated...

item.title: Calgary Faces $526M Annual Investment Need to Meet Affordable Housing Targets
item.description: Calgary city councilors are being presented with three funding options to address the city's affordable housing crisis. The briefing note outlines annual investment requirements of $93 million, $214 m...

item.title: ntel Expands into Digital Infrastructure and Real Estate with New Initiatives
item.description: ntel has launched a series of new ventures focused on digital infrastructure, connectivity, and real estate development. The company unveiled Beam, Titan, and Eden as key initiatives under its integra...

item.title: Vicky Kaushal and Katrina Kaif Celebrate Katrina's 43rd Birthday with Family and Fans
item.description: Vicky Kaushal shared an adorable photo of his wife Katrina Kaif's 43rd birthday celebration on Instagram, captioning it 'Jaan Ka Janamdin' (My love's birthday). The couple, married in December 2021, o...

item.title: NRL Round 20 Tips from Andrew Johns and Brad Fittler
item.description: The article discusses the NRL Tips for Round 20, featuring insights from former players Andrew Johns and Brad Fittler. Published on July 16, 2026, the piece highlights the challenges faced by Freddy, ...

item.title: Political Figure Denies Allegations Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: A prominent political figure has publicly addressed claims of character attacks, highlighting growing tensions in the political landscape. The statement comes as analysts note increased personal attac...

item.title: Opinion Piece Argues the UK's Push for Small Modular Reactors Is Economically and Politically Unsustainable
item.description: This opinion article argues that the United Kingdom has become the leading promoter of small modular reactors (SMRs) despite what the author describes as repeated evidence that the technology is not e...

item.title: Turkey Opens Visa-Free Travel for 9 African Nations in 2026
item.description: The Turkish government has confirmed that citizens of nine African countries will be eligible for visa-free travel to Turkey through its eVisa program starting in 2026. The list includes Algeria, Cape...

item.title: Delhi High Court Orders Police Response to Sharjeel Imam's Bail Plea in UAPA Case
item.description: The Delhi High Court has directed the Delhi police to respond to a bail plea filed by student activist Sharjeel Imam, who is accused under the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act (UAPA) in connection...

item.title: Canadian Grocery Shortcomings Despite Provincial Retaliation Against U.S. Imports
item.description: The article critiques Canada's provincial trade policies and their impact on grocery availability, contrasting it with the broader selection found in American stores. Ontario and Quebec's liquor board...

item.title: PMD Issues Detailed Forecast for Monsoon Rains and Thunderstorms Across Pakistan Until July 25
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued a detailed weather forecast predicting widespread monsoon rains, thunderstorms, and windstorms across the country until July 25. The advisory hi...

item.title: Rappler Fact-Check Debunks False Claims of New Impeachment Complaint Against Marcos
item.description: The article clarifies that there is no new impeachment complaint against President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. filed with the Senate. Previous complaints against him were dismissed in February 2026, triggeri...

item.title: Amanda Knox: A Bubbly Drama Without Closure
item.description: The Twisted Tale of Amanda Knox is an eight-part series that revisits the infamous 2007 murder of Meredith Kercher and the subsequent legal saga involving her roommate, Amanda Knox. The show, executiv...

item.title: Buffel grass spread after heavy rainfall intensifies environmental and cultural concerns across Central Australia
item.description: Record rainfall has transformed Australia's Red Centre into an unusually green landscape, but environmental groups, Traditional Owners and many Alice Springs residents say the change reflects the rapi...

item.title: U.S. Conducts Airstrikes on Iranian Infrastructure Amid Escalating Conflict
item.description: The United States has intensified its airstrikes against Iran, targeting bridges and a key port tower in Hormozgan province as part of a broader campaign to pressure Tehran over its control of the Str...

item.title: Security Forces Kill 24 Terrorists in Bannu District Operation
item.description: In a significant security operation, Pakistani military forces have eliminated at least 24 terrorists linked to the Indian-backed Fitna Al-Khwarij group in Bannu district. The Inter-Services Public Re...

item.title: Ruto Announces Infrastructure Projects and Political Outreach in Bungoma Ahead of 2027 Election
item.description: President William Ruto met with grassroots leaders from Bungoma County, led by Kimilili MP Didmus Barasa, at State House Nairobi to outline a multi-billion-shilling development agenda for Western Keny...

item.title: Ileje District Council Unveils Plan to Enhance Agricultural Markets
item.description: The Ileje District Council in Tanzania has announced a strategic initiative to construct modern markets aimed at improving agricultural productivity and commercialization. This project, unveiled durin...

item.title: Susan Africa Explains Viral 'Ubo-Ubo Acting' Image as Mandela Effect
item.description: Susan Africa, a popular Filipino actress, recently addressed the controversy surrounding her viral 'ubo-ubo acting' image, which sparked widespread debate online. She clarified that the image, which a...

item.title: Middle East Conflict Escalates as Iran and US Exchange Strikes, Casualties Rise
item.description: The article details the escalating conflict between Iran and the United States in the Middle East, with significant casualties reported in Iran following renewed military actions. Iran's health minist...
